popularStory.headline: Joan Geneville
popularStory.description:
Birth: Feb. 2, 1285
Ludlow
Shropshire, England
Death: Oct. 19, 1356, England

This memorial is dedicated to my ancestor Joan de Geneville, 2nd Baroness Geneville, Countess of March.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Geneville於1286年2月2日出生在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福 卡素時，她的父親Piers de Geneville30歲，母親Jeanne de Lusignan24歲。她於1301年9月20日與Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March在英國賀福爾布利其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年10月19日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利享年70歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Geneville于1286年2月2日出生在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福 卡素时，她的父亲Piers de Geneville30岁，母亲Jeanne de Lusignan24岁。她于1301年9月20日与Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March在英国賀福爾布利其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1356年10月19日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利享年70岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫維格莫 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Geneville was born on 2 February 1286, in Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England, her father, Piers de Geneville, was 30 and her mother, Jeanne de Lusignan, was 24. She married Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March on 20 September 1301, in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 19 October 1356, in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Geneville est née le 2 février 1286, à Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Piers de Geneville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Lusignan, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March le 20 septembre 1301, à Pembridge, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1356, à King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Geneville am 2. Februar 1286 in Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Piers de Geneville 30 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Lusignan 24. Sie hat am 20. September 1301 in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Oktober 1356 im Alter von 70 Jahren in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Geneville è nata il il 2 febbraio 1286 nel Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Piers de Geneville, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Lusignan, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March il 20 settembre 1301, nel Pembridge, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1356, nel King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Genevilleが1286年2月2日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Piers de Genevilleは30歳，母Jeanne de Lusignanは24歳であった。1301年9月20日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアペンブリッジでRoger Mortimer 1st Earl of Marchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年10月19日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアキング'ス スタンリーで70歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーウィグモー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스
ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Geneville(이)가 1286년 2월 2일 영국 슈럽실르 루들로 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Piers de Geneville(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Lusignan(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1301년 9월 20일 영국 허퍼드실르 p브리지에서 Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 10월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 킨그'스 스탠리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어 위그모어 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.2 February 1286–19 October 1356: 2 de fevereiro de 1286–19 de outubro de 1356
pt.Skipton Castle: Skipton, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England: King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England: Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Geneville nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1286, em Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Piers de Geneville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Lusignan, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March em 20 de setembro de 1301, em Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1356, em King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Eng: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Geneville родилась 2 февраля 1286 г. в местности лудлоу кастл, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Piers de Geneville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Lusignan, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March 20 сентября 1301 г. в местности пембридж, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 19 октября 1356 г. в местности кинг'с стэнли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности вигмор эбби, вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Geneville nació el 2 de febrero de 1286, en Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Piers de Geneville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Lusignan, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March el 20 de septiembre de 1301, en Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1356, en King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Wigmore Abbey, Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
